title: Scripture is ... Tom riddle's parable ( a horcrux witness memorialization )
body:
# the parable 
So the diary of Tom Riddle is a hexed, magically empowered, horcrux that can manifest another ontological instantiation of Voldemort from a past prior stage.

- It is authored by Tom Riddle in the past
- it is a faithful witness representation of Tom Riddle from the past for present audienceship 
- it is endowed with the mystical, unseen means to engage with present audiences through the medium of presently working, incessantly working, magic
- it is both **authored** and **maintained by magical power** as a counter measure to death; specifically the power of death to put away or silence the witnesshood/witness role of the author.
- discounter measure to death provides a bridge from the past witness to be able to communicate to the present audience who would seek or consult the testimony of that witness

### notes
- something like a pre-recorded hologram that can be interacted with beyond contemporaneous authorship of the pre-recording ( circa hologram Rick in Rick and Morty )

comments.author: TonyLinog
comments.body: This is a creative way to think about it. The spirit at the ready to work towards our use and understanding of scripture now when we read it.

labels: teach me how to use the Bible
tags: teach me how to use the Bible
